title: Örebro Cold Snap
lead: Örebro is experiencing a severe cold snap with a Z-Score of -3.03. This event has reached a critical level with a score of 10.0/10.
body:
The current weather conditions in Örebro are extremely cold, with a significant impact on the city's infrastructure. 
 The cold snap has resulted in a high Heating Degree Days (HDD) value of 11.6 GG, indicating a substantial need for heating. 
 The relative humidity is at 49% and the wind speed is moderate at 11.5 km/h, exacerbating the cold conditions.
conclusion: Immediate action is required to mitigate the effects of this critical cold snap event in Örebro.
